# Proposal Template

## Title

One short implementation-oriented title.

## Source

Link or name the suggestion, issue, review note, or discussion that led to this proposal.

## Problem

Describe the current behavior or weakness.

## Proposed Change

Describe the intended change in concrete terms.

## Scope

List the affected routes, files, or layers.

## Out Of Scope

List what this proposal will not change.

## Risks

List the main things that could break.

## Verification

List the exact checks to run.

## Branch Name

Example: `fix/example-topic`

## Status

Use one:

- draft
- approved
- in progress
- blocked
- merged
- dropped
